creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Testing the spamassassin port here in a jail (I use spamassassin-devel myself), I cannot reproduce the problem under 15-CURRENT.

Let's gather more information.

1. make clean. Remove your spamassassin work directory.

2. Run script. It will capture all output to a file named typescript. Just type, script, and hit enter. You will get another shell prompt.

3. Build the port by running, make.

4. When the build is complete/fails, type exit or hit ctrl-D to exit script.

5. You will see a file named typescript in your current directory. Please attach this file to this ticket so I can look at it. The answer should be in it. It's likely the files which failed to install were never built due to some error that was ignored by spamassassin's Makefile or by the ports infrastructure. We should be able to see the error message in the typescript file.
